title: Generative Model Taxonomies
code:
import numpy as np

def rmsnorm(x, g, eps=1e-6):
    rms = np.sqrt(np.mean(x**2, axis=-1, keepdims=True) + eps)
    return (x / rms) * g

def run_practice():
    x = np.array([[1.0, 1.0]])
    g = np.array([2.0, 2.0])
    out = rmsnorm(x, g)
    assert np.allclose(out, np.array([[2.0, 2.0]]))
    print('[PASS] RMSNorm checks completed.')

if __name__ == '__main__':
    run_practice()
